label: Konveyor OEE MES
info: Ayrik import edilebilir OEE dashboard tabi.

name: parse oee dashboard
OEE Theme
format:
<style>
:root {
  --bg-0: #08101a;
  --bg-1: #0f1826;
  --panel-border: #24364c;
  --text-main: #eef4ff;
  --text-soft: #9db1cb;
  --shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
}
body,
.nr-dashboard-theme,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-content,
.nr-dashboard-theme ui-view,
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(76, 201, 240, 0.10), transparent 26%),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.10), transparent 24%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #07101a 0%, #0b1420 46%, #101927 100%) !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-family: Bahnschrift, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  padding: 18px 22px 36px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardcontainer {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  padding: 0 8px 10px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar,
.nr-dashboard-theme .md-toolbar-tools {
  background: rgba(8, 16, 26, 0.94) !important;
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.14) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-card {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(17, 28, 43, 0.98) 0%, rgba(13, 22, 35, 0.98) 100%) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border) !important;
  border-radius: 22px !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow) !important;
  margin-bottom: 24px !important;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  color: var(--text-main) !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 20px 24px 12px !important;
}
.oee-shell,
.oee-stack,
.oee-trend-layout {
  display: block;
}
.oee-hero {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 18px;
  padding: 8px 4px 18px;
}
.oee-eyebrow {
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.oee-title {
  font-size: 34px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.oee-meta {
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}
.oee-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 0 16px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(85, 118, 156, 0.18);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.oee-badge-dot {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #5da9ff;
}
.oee-kpi-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}
.oee-kpi-card,
.oee-mini-card,
.oee-panel,
.oee-color-card {
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(85, 118, 156, 0.18);
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23, 36, 54, 0.92) 0%, rgba(16, 26, 40, 0.96) 100%) !important;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
}
.oee-kpi-card {
  min-height: 112px;
  padding: 18px;
}
.oee-kpi-card.is-featured {
  border-color: rgba(93, 169, 255, 0.38) !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(22, 39, 61, 0.98) 0%, rgba(12, 24, 41, 0.98) 100%) !important;
}
.oee-card-label {
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.oee-card-value {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 30px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
}
.oee-small-value {
  font-size: 20px;
}
.oee-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 14px;
}
.oee-panel {
  padding: 18px;
}
.oee-panel-title {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.oee-mini-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}
.oee-mini-card {
  min-height: 86px;
  padding: 16px;
}
.oee-info-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}
.oee-info-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 11px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(85, 118, 156, 0.16);
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 13px;
}
.oee-info-row:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
  padding-bottom: 0;
}
.oee-info-row strong {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 14px;
}
.oee-color-card {
  padding: 16px;
  border-left: 4px solid transparent;
}
.oee-color-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.oee-color-name {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.oee-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 32px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.oee-chip-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}
.oee-chip-item {
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
}
.oee-chip-item span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.oee-chip-item strong {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 15px;
}
.color-yellow {
  border-color: #f5c451 !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(73, 56, 17, 0.96) 0%, rgba(45, 34, 12, 0.98) 100%) !important;
}
.color-blue {
  border-color: #5da9ff !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(24, 48, 83, 0.96) 0%, rgba(16, 30, 55, 0.98) 100%) !important;
}
.color-red {
  border-color: #ff6b6b !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(73, 24, 31, 0.96) 0%, rgba(43, 17, 22, 0.98) 100%) !important;
}
.oee-trend-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(280px, 0.65fr);
  gap: 14px;
}
.oee-trend-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}
.oee-trend-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 72px minmax(0, 1fr) 88px;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 12px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(85, 118, 156, 0.16);
}
.oee-trend-row:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
  padding-bottom: 0;
}
.oee-trend-time {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding-top: 4px;
}
.oee-trend-bars {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}
.oee-bar {
  display: grid;
  gap: 6px;
}
.oee-bar span {
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 12px;
}
.oee-bar-track {
  width: 100%;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
}
.oee-bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 999px;
}
.fill-oee {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5da9ff 0%, #8ad6ff 100%);
}
.fill-quality {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #39d98a 0%, #8bf0bd 100%);
}
.fill-performance {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f5c451 0%, #ffd97d 100%);
}
.oee-trend-error {
  color: var(--text-main);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: right;
  padding-top: 4px;
}
.oee-note-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.oee-note-item {
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  color: var(--text-main);
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.oee-console-label {
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.oee-console {
  min-height: 88px;
  max-height: 160px;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 14px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: rgba(7, 11, 18, 0.92);
  border: 1px solid rgba(54, 80, 109, 0.6);
  color: #dce7f5;
  font-family: 'Cascadia Code', Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  word-break: break-word;
}
.oee-empty {
  padding: 14px 4px 8px;
  color: var(--text-soft);
  font-size: 13px;
}
.tone-good {
  border-color: rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.26) !important;
}
.tone-warn {
  border-color: rgba(245, 196, 81, 0.26) !important;
}
.tone-bad {
  border-color: rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.26) !important;
}
.tone-good .oee-card-value,
.tone-good strong {
  color: #bdf5d8 !important;
}
.tone-warn .oee-card-value,
.tone-warn strong {
  color: #ffe8a6 !important;
}
.tone-bad .oee-card-value,
.tone-bad strong {
  color: #ffc3c3 !important;
}
.tone-good .oee-badge-dot {
  background: #39d98a;
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(57, 217, 138, 0.95);
}
.tone-warn .oee-badge-dot {
  background: #f5c451;
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(245, 196, 81, 0.95);
}
.tone-bad .oee-badge-dot {
  background: #ff6b6b;
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.95);
}
@media (max-width: 960px) {
  .oee-hero {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .oee-kpi-grid,
  .oee-mini-grid,
  .oee-chip-grid,
  .oee-trend-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .oee-trend-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .oee-trend-error {
    text-align: left;
  }
}
</style>

name: OEE Overview
format:
{{msg.payload.header.subtitle}}
{{msg.payload.header.title}}
Son guncelleme {{msg.payload.updatedAt}} | {{msg.payload.header.stateSummary}}
{{msg.payload.header.lineState}}
{{item.label}}
{{item.value}}
OEE verisi bekleniyor...

name: OEE Operations
format:
Uretim Ozeti
{{item.label}}
{{item.value}}
Durus ve Hedef
Planli durus{{msg.payload.downtime.planned}}
Plansiz durus{{msg.payload.downtime.unplanned}}
Toplam durus{{msg.payload.downtime.total}}
Durus nedeni{{msg.payload.downtime.reason}}
Ariza durumu{{msg.payload.downtime.status}}
Hedef / Gerceklesen{{msg.payload.targets.ideal}} / {{msg.payload.targets.actual}}
Toplam kayip{{msg.payload.targets.totalLoss}}
Genel hata orani{{msg.payload.targets.errorRate}}
Durus ve uretim kartlari veri bekliyor...

name: OEE Colors
format:
{{item.name}}
{{item.mixRate}}% mix
Toplam{{item.total}}
Saglam{{item.good}}
Hurda{{item.scrap}}
Yeniden{{item.rework}}
Kalite{{item.qualityRate}}%
Kayip{{item.lossRate}}%
{{item.label}}
{{item.value}}
Renk bazli kalite kartlari veri bekliyor...

name: OEE Trend
format:
Trend Izleme
{{item.time}}
OEE {{item.oee}}%
Kalite {{item.quality}}%
Performans {{item.performance}}%
Hata {{item.error}}%
Operasyon Notlari
{{note}}
Son veri paketi
{{msg.payload.rawLine}}
Trend verisi olusmasi icin OEE mesaji bekleniyor...
